  Paginated transaction history for a user

Paginated transaction history for a user

## Example (cURL)

```bash
curl -X GET "http://localhost:3001/api/transactions?page=1&limit=20" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_TOKEN"
Example (JavaScript)
const res = await fetch(
  "http://localhost:3001/api/transactions?page=1&limit=20",
  {
    headers: {
      "Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_TOKEN"
    }
  }
);

console.log(await res.json());
Example (Python)
import requests

res = requests.get(
  "http://localhost:3001/api/transactions?page=1&limit=20",
  headers={"Authorization": "Bearer YOUR_TOKEN"}
)

print(res.json())

---
